RuleSet.Name: src/schemapub/ISchemaPubTableFactory.java

GenFile.Name: reallyFileISchemaPubTableFactoryJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$pub/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$pub

RuleSet.GenRule: $switch HasSuperClassRelation no declPubRecNewPKey default empty$$switch HasSuperClassRelation no declPubNewHPKey default empty$$iterate Index( each declPubNewNonPrimaryIndexKey )$$declPubNewRec$$declPubNewHRec$
$switch HasDefSchema default empty no reallyDeclPubNewHPKeyIfHasHistory empty empty$
$switch HasDefSchema default empty no reallyDeclPubNewHRecIfHasHistory empty empty$
